calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Tamara Rosselli, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Aileen Buonlamperti.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 28, 2009.

Plaintiff introduced the following Exhibits:

Exhibit 1--Three (3) Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated May 11, 2009---------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Aileen BuonLamperit as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $628.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,281.54.
Costs - $215.00.
Total - $2,124.54.

Additionally, plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, #506, San Francisco, CA 94103. The rental agreement is canceled.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the return of the Exhibit.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Removed from Settlement Conference Calendar set for AUG-12-2009 - No Appearance BY DEFENDANT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS. JURY TRIAL IS NOT STRICKEN.
COMMISSIONER WILLIAM GARGANO, NOT REPORTED, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA (218).
